subcodes.first_line: O Son of A and H! We have willed to make mention of him once again, as a bounty from God, the Lord of all beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن الالف و الحاء انا اردنا ان نذکره مره اخری فضلا من لدی الله مولی الوری
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for the departed
